summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that a `global:member` account can create a dynamic-registration OAuth2 credential and trigger n8n to issue loopback GET and POST requests to attacker-chosen HTTP endpoints during `/rest/oauth2-credential/auth`.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should cause a low-privileged member's `/rest/oauth2-credential/auth` request to make n8n send loopback discovery GETs and a registration POST to an attacker-controlled observer on `127.0.0.1:18089`.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned n8n commit `2374f40ec36795904b4011fb81018da818a76ee8`, built the reproduction image, started n8n 2.14.0, created owner and member accounts, stored a malicious `oAuth2Api` credential, invoked `/rest/oauth2-credential/auth`, and observed the expected GET `/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp`, GET `/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server/as`, and POST `/register` sequence on the loopback observer. The run emitted the exact success signal `SSRF_VERIFIED: member-triggered dynamic OAuth registration reached the loopback observer`.
verification_method: `reproduction/verify.mjs` starts a loopback observer and only exits successfully if the observer records the protected-resource discovery GET, the authorization-server metadata GET, and the registration POST with the expected OAuth payload after the member-triggered `/rest/oauth2-credential/auth` call. `reproduction/run.sh` additionally greps for the exact success signal in `reproduction/last-run.log`.
evidence_produced_by_run: reproduction/last-run.log contains `SSRF_VERIFIED: member-triggered dynamic OAuth registration reached the loopback observer`.
The observer captured GET `/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp` from `axios/1.13.5` on `127.0.0.1:18089`.
The observer captured GET `/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server/as` from `axios/1.13.5` on `127.0.0.1:18089`.
The observer captured POST `/register` with n8n's dynamic client registration JSON body, including `redirect_uris`, `grant_types`, and `client_name`.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
